data.name: Hazel & The Deep
data.detailed_description:
A blast from the past from our beloved artist Doxy. Hazel is a turnip farmer by day and a witch student by night! With the help of her beloved, but grumpy, master Monty she practices every day in order to be able to enroll into a prestigious magical school. But Hazel has one small, tini-tiny idiosyncrasy, for some reason our heroine always adds Penis and Breasts to any object she touches or cast magic at, even causing the turnips she picks up to be phallic shaped (she calls them Durnips). How can our heroine pass the magic school exam? Do durnips sell better than turnips for lonely housewives? Why is there a millennial demon awakening in her backyard? Find out all the answers in Hazel & The Deep!

The Remaster from the web game comes extra shiny and with new improvements!

  • GALLERY MODE: A quick access to all the smut and artwork made by your favorite artist Doxy!

  • ANIMATIONS: All of Doxy character art animated! (Specially the Jiggly bits)

  • FULLY VOICED: Who needs to read when you have our talented VA giving life to our great and deep characters?

  • QoL: Saving, cloud saving, achievements, display support, you name it! All to help you get the best experience in this high-jinx filled comedy horror!

data.short_description: A Doxy certified classic returns! This original web game is now remastered in a new engine, fully voiced and animated to shine through its sexy glory!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and Newer
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
